text:
Created attachment 196054
1.2-p3 svn diff

Update sysutils/vm-bhyve to v1.2-p3

This fixes an issue with the "vm image provision" command

I've marked merge-quarterly=? as this is a fix (no functional changes) and affects the ability for users to use the above command. It's not a critical fix though so this can be cleared if not appropriate.
